title: heliophila macra
intro: Heliophila macra, also known as Long-leaved Heliophila, is a flowering plant species in the genus Heliophila, native to Australia. This plant has been used traditionally in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heliophila macra include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as exhibit antioxidant properties. Heliophila macra can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
